nodes.label: AI reliability and factuality
nodes.grounding_span: verify factual information in a quicker way

nodes.label: AI as research assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as inadequate for subjective/complex topics
nodes.grounding_span: AI models typically struggle with more complex, subjective topics

nodes.label: AI reliability in citations
nodes.label_negative: AI as provider of unreliable sources
nodes.grounding_span: provided several articles that were not reputable

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary for skilled researchers
nodes.grounding_span: I am faster and more efficient at finding information generally, so I may use AI less

nodes.label: AI as verification-requiring tool
nodes.grounding_span: still needs to be verified by a human

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: the information is very helpful and accurate, especially for common knowledge type information

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for initial paper discovery
nodes.grounding_span: This is particularly annoying because you would think that the model would be good at finding a paper

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI
nodes.grounding_span: I try not to overly rely on AI content and do my due diligence to check anything suspicious

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: my colleagues have a fairly positive approach towards using AI in their daily lives which has definitely made me more open

nodes.label: Systematic verification through source checking
nodes.grounding_span: I will look at its cited sources where relevant and verify the information at the source itself

nodes.label: Iterative refinement of queries
nodes.grounding_span: I might break down the topic into smaller sub-topics if I notice the AI is struggling
